name: AI Agent Infrastructure
postCreateCommand:
mkdir -p ~/.ssh && chmod 700 ~/.ssh && echo 'Host github-private
  HostName github.com
  User git' > ~/.ssh/config && chmod 600 ~/.ssh/config && git config --global user.name 'irisor' && git config --global user.email '13061827+irisor@users.noreply.github.com' && git config --global --add safe.directory /workspaces/my-claudy && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code && echo 'alias claude="claude --model qwen3-coder:30b --dangerously-skip-permissions"' >> ~/.bashrc
